messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).

No, Mencius did not write the Analects (論語). The Analects is a compilation of the sayings and conversations of Confucius, assembled by his disciples after his death. Mencius, though a major Confucian thinker who lived roughly a century after Confucius, is associated with his own text — the Mencius (孟子). While Mencius was deeply influenced by Confucius, he is not the author or compiler of the Analects.
